h1.visual_description: Large, black, serif font, significant top margin, used for primary document sections.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, blue, serif font, often prefixed with a sequential number followed by a period.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table of Contents entry containing a chapter number, title, and right-aligned page number.
Navigational links or interactive elements within the document structure.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Not explicitly shown; likely academic (APA/MLA) based on subject matter.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Clean margins with no visible running headers or footers on the contents page.
